reference_name: Colangelo impedance-matched differential SNSPD Detector A 1550 nm PNR profile

used_for: primary citation and published detector operating point
source text confirming Detector A 1550 nm operating values and PNR up to three photons

system_detection_efficiency_scope: saturated system detection efficiency for Detector A at 1550 nm
dark_count_rate_scope: approximately 200 s^-1 for Detector A at 1550 nm
dead_time_or_max_count_rate_scope: reset-time-limited estimate from approximately 160 ns reset time; maximum count rate was not directly measured
pnr_capability_scope: pulse-amplitude photon-number discrimination using differential output signal processing
photon_number_resolution_limitations: The paper demonstrates discrimination up to three photons, but does not provide a calibrated photon-number POVM/confusion matrix; the histogram generator uses its generic saturated PNR SNSPD count model with max count 3.
readout_architecture: impedance-matched differential readout with differential-to-single-ended signal conditioning
active_area_note: large-area single-pixel differential SNSPD; Detector A is optimized for 1550 nm
notes: Usable demonstrated 1550 nm PNR-capable SNSPD operating point for the Fock/PNR detector model. This is not the Korzh sub-3 ps record detector and not the PEACOQ high-count-rate detector; it trades higher jitter for complete usable efficiency, dark-count, reset-time, and PNR metadata.
